   "reasoning":"I've got to focus on keeping my teachers on board - we can't afford to lose any more talent. The scholarship program is a no-brainer at this point, and reallocating resources will make it look like I'm doing something. Transparency is a cheap way to show the community I'm still engaged. Don't bother with attendance mandates or new hires; we can't afford the risk. Counseling programs are a good band-aid, but we need to fix the underlying issues.",
   "confidence":0.8
